video_classification_rationale: This is NOT an FLS task performance video. The content is an educational/instructional video featuring a female surgeon discussing tubal ligation (sterilization) procedures, explaining minimally invasive methods, anatomical concepts via animation, and clinical benefits. There is no FLS trainer equipment, no ligating loop task execution, no timed task performance, and no instruments manipulated. The video uses narration, text overlays, animations, and cartoon illustrations to educate viewers about gynecological sterilization procedures. This falls under 'instructional' classification per the rubric.
cannot_score: This is an instructional/educational video, not an FLS task performance. No task execution, trainer equipment, or instruments are visible. Scoring is not applicable.

demonstrated_techniques: Ligating loop occlusion of fallopian tube via rubber-band-like mechanism
Alternative tubal ligation method via transection and separation
common_errors_addressed: Video does not address common FLS task errors; it is clinical educational content, not technical skills training
clinical_context_provided: Two occlusion techniques: rubber-band-like loop and tubal transection with separation
Advantages: minimal pain, minimal analgesic requirement, no recovery time
teaching_content.skill_level_demonstrated: educational/clinical overview — not an FLS skills demonstration

content_summary: This instructional video explains laparoscopic tubal ligation (Filshie clip or endoloop sterilization) as a permanent contraception method. The surgeon discusses the procedure's minimally invasive nature, its 15-20 minute duration, minimal pain and analgesic requirements, and lack of required recovery time. Animated diagrams illustrate two occlusion mechanisms: a rubber-band-like loop placed around the tube and tubal transection with gap creation. The clinical benefits (outpatient procedure, minimal morbidity) are emphasized. This is NOT an FLS task video and does not demonstrate the FLS ligating loop task (which involves a red foam appendage model, pre-tied loop deployment, knot advancement at a marked site, and tail cutting in a trainer box).
confidence_rationale: Classification confidence is maximal because the video content is unambiguously educational/instructional with narration, animations, text overlays, office setting, and no FLS equipment or task execution whatsoever. No task scoring is possible or warranted.
